evals.name: python-library-github
evals.expected_output: A Learn X in Y Minutes style tutorial with YAML frontmatter, sections for introduction/installation/core API/usage, and Python code examples from the actual SDK.
assertions: Output has YAML frontmatter with 'language' field set to 'python'
Output includes at least one code example
Code example uses actual API from the SDK (e.g., Anthropic class, messages.create)

evals.name: local-repo
evals.prompt: Generate a learnxinyminutes tutorial for the current directory
evals.expected_output: A Learn X in Y Minutes style tutorial for the learn_repo_in_minutes project, showing the FastAPI app structure and tutorial generation flow.
assertions: Output identifies the project as Python/FastAPI
Output mentions the coordinator agent or tutorial generation pipeline
Output includes code examples from the actual codebase
Sections are appropriate for a web framework/library project

evals.name: cli-tool-github
evals.prompt: Create a learnxinyminutes guide for https://github.com/cli/cli (GitHub CLI)
evals.expected_output: A Learn X in Y Minutes style tutorial for GitHub CLI with sections for installation, basic commands, and common workflows.
assertions: Output identifies the project as a CLI tool
Output covers basic commands like 'gh repo', 'gh pr'
Sections follow CLI tool template: Introduction, Installation, Basic Commands, Advanced Usage
